---
name: Clause Conflict Report
about: Report a conflict or contradiction between two clauses in PSVL
title: "[Conflict] "
labels: clause-conflict
assignees: BMBOMICH
---

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE

1. Keep the "[Conflict]" prefix in the title above and add a short
   summary after it (example: "[Conflict] clause 3.3.2 vs 4.6.1").
2. Under each ## heading below, TYPE YOUR ANSWER on the lines provided
   (or directly above the next heading).
3. Lines wrapped in HTML comment syntax are hidden instructions for
   you; they do NOT appear in the published issue. Leave them as-is or
   delete them, your choice.
4. Sections marked "(optional)" can be left empty.
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## Have you searched existing issues?

<!-- Check the box by replacing [ ] with [x] -->

- [ ] I searched [**open**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3Aclause-conflict)
  and [**closed**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/issues?q=state%3Aclosed%20label%3Aclause-conflict)
  clause-conflict issues and this one is not a duplicate

## PSVL version

<!-- Type the PSVL version this report is about (e.g., 1.0) -->

## Which clauses conflict?

<!-- Type the two clause numbers here (e.g., clause 3.3.2 vs clause 4.6.1) -->

## What is the conflict?

<!-- Type a clear description of how the two clauses contradict each other.
     Quote the exact wording if helpful. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- Type the real-world scenario that would expose the conflict
     and the harm that could result if it's not fixed. -->

## Suggested resolution (optional)

<!-- If you have a fix in mind (which clause should win, how to reword),
     type it here. -->

## Anything else (optional)

<!-- Anything else you want to add. -->
